Tests division of negative infinity by 2 in JavaScript.

# Purpose
This code is a simple assertion test that checks the behavior of dividing `Number.NEGATIVE_INFINITY` by 2 in JavaScript. The test confirms that the result of this division is still `Number.NEGATIVE_INFINITY`, which is consistent with the mathematical properties of infinity. This code provides narrow functionality, focusing on a specific aspect of JavaScript's handling of special numeric values. It is useful for validating the expected behavior of the JavaScript `Number` object in edge cases involving infinite values.
